_comment: Example POST /backtest body. Mirrors the momentum+value+market_cap / IsLargest 20 / monthly-rebalance strategy that OOM'd the 128MB Worker. `symbols`/`from`/`to` are illustrative — fill with the real universe. Run: YUZU_DATA_DIR=<dir-with-prices/+fundamentals/> yuzu-server, then curl -XPOST :8080/backtest -d @backtest-request.json
